title: Unable to Reset Password via Email
description: Customer has not received the password reset email after multiple attempts. They have checked their spam folder and confirmed the email address on file is correct.

title: Checkout Page Freezes on Payment
description: Customer reports that the checkout page becomes unresponsive when they attempt to enter card details. The issue occurs consistently on Safari and Chrome browsers.

title: Subscription Plan Not Upgrading
description: Customer paid for a plan upgrade but their account still reflects the old plan. The payment was deducted from their account but the features have not been unlocked.

title: Wrong Item Delivered
description: Customer received a completely different product than what was ordered. The packaging label shows the correct order number but the contents do not match.

title: Dashboard Data Not Loading
description: Customer's dashboard displays a blank screen after logging in. All widgets and analytics data fail to load and the page shows a spinning loader indefinitely.

title: Invoice Showing Incorrect Tax Amount
description: Customer noticed that the tax amount on their latest invoice does not match the rate applicable to their region. They have attached the invoice for reference.

title: API Key Stopped Working Unexpectedly
description: Customer's API key was functioning correctly until yesterday when all requests started returning a 401 unauthorized error. No changes were made to their integration.

title: Email Notifications Not Being Received
description: Customer is not receiving any email notifications for order updates or account activity. Their email preferences are correctly configured and the address is verified.

title: Dark Mode Not Saving Preference
description: Customer switches to dark mode from settings but the preference resets back to light mode every time they log out and log back in to the application.

title: File Upload Failing for Large Documents
description: Customer is unable to upload documents larger than 5MB despite the platform advertising a 20MB limit. The upload progress bar reaches 100% but then throws a server error.
